title: Roasted Canadian Kanten Casserole
description: A sweet and savory dessert made with roasted kanten, agar, and deliciously rich flavors.
instructions: Soak the kanten in water for at least 4 hours.
Drain and rinse the kanten, then chop into small pieces.
In a saucepan, combine the agar powder, maple syrup, coconut milk, and vanilla extract.
Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, then reduce the heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the chopped kanten and roasted almonds to the saucepan.
Pour the mixture into a baking dish and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Cut into squares and serve chilled.
Optional: garnish with additional roasted almonds and maple syrup.
